evidence.source_title: Exiled Iranian journalist Pouria Zeraati stabbed in London
evidence.description: CPJ confirms Zeraati joined Iran International in 2020 as a producer and presenter and is best known as host of The Last Word (Harf-e-Akhar).

editorial_notes: Joined Iran International in 2020. Host of political analysis programme The Last Word (Harf-e-Akhar).
